classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council

title: Canon L.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: No one at all, whether cleric or layman, is from this time forward to play at dice.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: And if any one hereafter shall be found doing so, if he be a cleric he is to be deposed, if a layman let him be cut off.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: A layman should not play at dice.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: This renews canons xlii. and xliij. of the Apostolic canons.
